name: Friendship
challenge: Use respectful words: say please, thank you, or sorry to someone today. Tap when you have spoken kindly.

stories.title: The New Classmate
stories.reflection: How could you include someone who feels left out?

pages.text: A new pupil sat quietly at lunchtime.
Layan invited them to sit nearby because everybody deserves to feel welcome.
They laughed together and planned a fair game for next break.
Year 3 teamwork: cooperation sounds polite, but it still needs respectful listening when friends disagree.
If two plans clash, pause and seek a calm solution everyone can accept.

stories.title: Team Tower
stories.reflection: When is listening more helpful than rushing?

pages.text: Two partners built a tower from wooden blocks.
They listened carefully before adding the next block.
Their tower stood tall although it wobbled once.
Even respectful builders can disagree about the next block — that is normal.
